reference: Five days ago, I slipped on a tile floor and landed hard on my back. It knocked the wind out of me. I also hit my head. I had my back X-rayed and there was no new injury. The stiffness is improving, but now I have sharp pain in my chest on the right side, front if I stand or sit for long. If I lie on my back, I feel fine. Any ideas?
text: Five days ago, I slipped on the tile floor and landed hard on my back. I knocked the wind out of me. Tail also hit my head. I had my back excruciatingly. No new injury. Fitness is complete. But now I have sharp pain in my chest when I rise from the front if I stand or sit for long. If I lie on my back, I feel fine. And the idea.
